headline: How Insider Buying and New Power and Water Ambitions At Texas Pacific Land (TPL) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In early April 2026, Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a 10% owner of Texas Pacific Land, modestly increased its stake amid a broader pattern of insider buying, while KeyBanc highlighted growth opportunities in power generation, data center use cases, and the water business. This combination of insider conviction and interest in new land and water monetization avenues underscores how Texas Pacific Land’s asset base is being reexamined beyond traditional oil and gas royalties. We’ll now...
